core_mechanism: constrained maximum-entropy (maximum-caliber) inference over the probability distribution of whole dynamical trajectories: select the least-biased path-space distribution that maximizes Shannon entropy subject to imposed macroscopic constraints
brief_reason: The abstract applies Jaynes' information-theory formalism to construct the probability distribution over microscopic phase-space trajectories of driven systems, from which the fluctuation theorem, maximum entropy production, and self-organized criticality are then derived.
